title: agrostis polymorpha var. capillaris
intro: Agrostis polymorpha var. capillaris, also known as blue grass or alpine hair grass, is a variety of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Agrostis polymorpha var. capillaris include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, as well as its potential to improve wound healing and skin conditions. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, and is also used in traditional medicine in various forms, including dried extracts and essential oils.
